phase.title: Foundation
phase.goal: Repo, RepoPlanner submodule, `.planning/` contract, pushed to `main`.

phase.title: Product & workflow planning
phase.goal: PRD, CRM/integration strategy, workflow docs, architecture notes (Payload + Supabase + Vercel).

phase.title: Landing & Payload scaffold
phase.goal: Payload website baseline plus seeded public marketing site, proof content, and quick-edit content paths for launch pages.

phase.title: Supabase + team access
phase.goal: Wire Postgres to Supabase; env for prod/dev; seed users bg@ / pb@ / de@ grimetime.app; auth verified.

phase.title: Customers, forms & ops integrations
phase.goal: Lead forms, Payload-native CRM lifecycle, scheduling, Resend follow-up, and Stripe billing handoff for quote-driven follow-up.

phase.title: Quoting & advanced ops
phase.goal: Quoting system; internal dashboard with real business targets; growth playbook; phased equipment/tool guidance; optional in-app credential vault if approved after security design.

phase.title: First-party CRM, billing, and automation
phase.goal: Replace the old third-party CRM mental model with a Payload-native CRM workspace, Stripe webhook billing sync, and Payload-jobs-driven Resend sequences that power compact admin and customer account surfaces.

phase.title: AI ops assistant (beta)
phase.goal: Optional, feature-flagged staff employee copilot: portfolio-style Assistant UI and Tool UI patterns, internal-docs RAG using the same efficient local-ingestion mindset as the portfolio and Magicborn flow, and assistant-rendered ops components for tours, assigned tasks, and follow-up contacts. It stays strictly scoped to business operations and is not a customer-facing product until explicitly promoted.

phase.title: Seed system & developer CLI
phase.goal: Modular, first-class seeding for this repo only: split foundation vs demo data, slice by media/pages/globals/modules, a polished CLI (dry-run, confirmations, overwrite policy), redundancy and media safety reporting, and demo fixtures wired for unit/integration/e2e tests.

phase.title: Lead capture expansion channels
phase.goal: Evaluate later-lifecycle lead-capture channels such as Google Business Profile messaging and only enable them when response-time coverage, inbox routing, and follow-up ownership are strong enough to protect conversion and local-search reputation.

phase.title: Field-agent messaging, notifications, and subscriptions
phase.goal: Ship employee quote-notification email first, then add a shared Grime Time tool surface for field-agent messaging and an OpenClaw plugin path, while keeping Stripe as the default infrastructure for recurring services and subscriptions.

phase.title: Organizations, RBAC, and provider sync
phase.goal: Define a first-party organization and membership model, keep Clerk as the identity provider rather than the business-authorization source of truth, support role and entitlement changes from Grime Time admin, and sync org/user changes safely to external providers and downstream apps.

phase.title: Visual page composer and copilot authoring
phase.goal: Turn the existing local page-media workbench and Payload page model into a visual authoring system: reusable sections, add/remove/reorder/swap workflows, draft pages and slug management, inline content and media editing, and an AI-aware copilot that understands the selected page or section context.

phase.title: Public quote estimator intake and pricing calibration
phase.goal: Upgrade the homepage instant quote experience so it can optionally intake a series of customer job photos, keep the estimator fast and low-friction on `/`, and recalibrate public pricing math before broader quote automation or confidence claims expand.

phase.title: Visual composer foundations and builder shell
phase.goal: Reconcile the existing Payload page/template data and current composer into a formal block-based builder foundation: audit real existing sections into a block registry, fix the builder shell and page-level controls, turn Structure into a proper block organizer, and ship a Softr-style categorized insertion flow.

phase.title: Visual composer inline editing and publish workflow
phase.goal: Make the preview the primary interactive editing surface: mirrored selection, hover actions, inline text editing, responsive preview modes, compact draft handling, and an actionable publish workflow.

phase.title: Visual composer reusable blocks, dynamic data, and containers
phase.goal: Bring the full block system to life with linked-or-detached reusable blocks, pre-wired dynamic blocks, constrained container slots, and a real Custom HTML block with explicit safety rules.

doc-flow.doc: Cross-phase gates (demo seed, deferred AI tour, etc.).
Phase folders aligned with this roadmap.
